meaning: 苏州[江苏省](旧译 Soochow 或 Suchou)
examples: Suzhou is celebrated for her beautiful gardens.
Students in Suzhou need to take a swimming test.
Sometimes choosing where to eat in Suzhou is something of a challenge.
Located outside of Shanghai, Suzhou was looking to distinguish itself from its larger-than-life neighboring city.
Graduate of Suzhou University studied interior design before zeroing in on career in apparel.
